name: Shropshire Council
_manifest_complications: Personal redaction placeholder supplier name common (GDPR redaction)
Amounts as strings with thousand-separator commas — parser must cast
Body Ref is ONS code (00GG)
Includes some sub-£500 rows — council admits incomplete filtering
Slugs in URLs are opaque hashes, not date-derived

name: Herefordshire Council
_manifest_complications: Supplier name column (Ap/Ar ID(T)) is redacted wholesale — every row shows 'Redacted'
Unusable for supplier-level analytics without FOI request
Opaque slug-based URLs — not date-derivable
Period column is YYYYMM integer
TT code column purpose unclear

name: Warrington Borough Council
_manifest_complications: WebFetch returns 403 — User-Agent spoofing required (curl with Mozilla UA returns 200)
Inconsistent filename separators (underscores, hyphens, spaces) — regex matching needed
BODY NAME column is a linked-data URI not a plain name
Drupal upload-month paths (YYYY-MM) do not correspond to data month
Some rows have posting dates from prior year leaking into current year files

name: Brighton and Hove City Council
_manifest_complications: Threshold £250 (not £500)
Dual-published: CSV + PDF for each month
Date format DD/MM/YYYY
18-column schema
Case varies in filenames
Sibling /spending page is stale 14 MB inline-HTML dump (2020 only) — do not use

name: Wigan Metropolitan Borough Council
_manifest_complications: File-naming inconsistency: Open-Data-2022-2023 vs Open-Data-2024 folder structure
Supplier Name column sometimes blank, fallback to (T) variant
Monthly files, ~5-8k rows each

name: West Northamptonshire Council
_manifest_complications: Amounts stored as text with £ symbol and commas (e.g. "-£23,484.00") — requires parsing
Legacy CCC/NCC/MKC column suffixes from pre-2021 Northamptonshire County + Milton Keynes accounting systems
Many columns sparsely populated depending on source system
Credits shown as negative
Opaque CMS media IDs — no human-readable URL pattern

name: North Northamptonshire Council
_manifest_complications: Amounts stored as text with £ symbol, thousand separators and quotes (e.g. "-£8,503.95")
Opaque CMS media IDs — no human-readable URL pattern
Cleaner schema than West Northamptonshire — no legacy suffixes

name: Reading Borough Council
_manifest_complications: UTF-8 BOM present
Filename pattern drifts: inconsistent 'Spend' infix, '23' vs '2023', 'B' suffixes for Feb/Mar 2024 re-uploads
Aug 2023 onward re-hosted Sept 2025 — original mid-2024 URLs are dead
Negatives in Amount column represent credit notes
~5,500–6,000 rows/month

name: Milton Keynes City Council
_manifest_complications: CRITICAL: cp1252 encoding — £ symbol corrupts under naive UTF-8 parsing
Publish-month subdirectory varies per file — not reliably templatable, must scrape landing page
Filename uses 2-digit year (e.g. 'April 23' not 'April 2023')
Some files have '_0' suffix
Amount values prefixed with £ and negatives for credits
~6,000–7,000 rows/month
_validation_warnings: dept: "Service Area Categorisation (MKC only)" → "Service Area Categorisation" [substring]

name: BCP Council
_manifest_complications: Three different URL path prefixes across months: /documents/, /documents-old/, /Assets/About-the-council/Budgets-and-finance/Payments-to-suppliers/
June 2023 file under /documents-old/ not /documents/
2024 files dropped '-Data' suffix in filename
Threshold effectively £0 — full AP feed including £13.52 rows; must filter ≥£500 client-side
AMOUNT column is string prefixed with £
~25,000–30,000 rows/month — largest of the batch

name: Thurrock Council
_manifest_complications: Amount column header has leading/trailing whitespace: ' Amounts '
Amount values are quoted with internal comma formatting e.g. " 27,000.00 " with whitespace padding
S114 issued Dec 2022 — data complete but row volumes artificially low (~1,800/month vs peers' 5,000–7,000) due to spend freeze
Merchant Category uses CIPFA codes
Month column is textual (Apr-23 style)

name: Doncaster Metropolitan Borough Council
_manifest_complications: NOT a £500 threshold file — full spend export, ~22% of rows under £500
~30,000 rows/month (not typical spend-over-500 volume)
Negative/reversed entries present
Fixed-width padding with trailing spaces in dept columns
Supplier redaction: 'REDACTED PERSONAL DATA'
Dual hosting: Azure blob store (Apr–Sep 2023) and CMS proxy (Oct 2023–Mar 2024)
November file has '-1' suffix
Separate quarterly purchase-card XLSX files

name: Barnsley Metropolitan Borough Council
_manifest_complications: 4 metadata rows preamble before header row (header on row 6)
£500 gross threshold (not net)
Filename prefix changes: 'exp-ex-gbp500' Apr-Jun 2023, 'exp-ex-500' from Jul 2023
Unique CMS slug per month — URLs not guessable without crawling landing page
Latin-1 encoding with £ glyphs
VCSE and Charity Number flag columns included
Not on Data Mill North

name: Solihull Metropolitan Borough Council
_manifest_complications: £250 threshold (not £500)
Net-of-VAT amounts
Filename casing and hyphenation chaotic — varies per month
Date format dd-mm-yyyy
Card Transaction flag column present
ProClass categorisation column included
Service Area Categorisation column present

name: Trafford Metropolitan Borough Council
_manifest_complications: All FY2023/24 data consolidated into single 34MB ZIP archive — must download and unzip
Old per-month URLs (/about-your-council/open-data/docs/) all 404 since Dec 2025 site migration
Amount column uses quoted thousands separator — requires thousands=',' on parse
UTF-8 BOM encoding
VAT registration numbers included in data
Trailing space on Body URI field
ProClass and SeRCOP/BVACOP coding columns present
Internal ZIP path: January_2019-March_2024/Trafford-Supplier-Spend-{Month}-{Year}.csv

name: Cambridgeshire County Council
_manifest_complications: Encoding is cp1252 not UTF-8
Amount is string with embedded £ sign and comma thousands separator e.g. '£5,414.40'
Threshold is £500 inc. VAT
CKAN package_show is extremely slow (229s)
Drupal dataset HTML page hangs 180s+ — use CKAN API or direct file URLs

name: Blackpool Council
_manifest_complications: Threshold is £250, not £500 — downstream filtering required
Filename typo for March 2024: 'Transparency-spend-Marc-2024.csv' (not 'March')
Amount fields are quoted strings with embedded commas (e.g. "2,890.00") — requires careful CSV parsing
Empty/blank column between Service Division and Directorate columns
Redacted personal data rows have supplier = 'REDACTED PERSONAL DATA'
18 columns total including multiple service/directorate hierarchy levels
~9,622 rows/month, ~2 MB/month

name: County Durham Council
_manifest_complications: encoding is cp1252 not UTF-8
amounts quoted with pound sign and thousand separators e.g. "£1,041.00" need unquoting
media IDs in URLs are not sequential/predictable — exact ID list must be maintained

name: Derby City Council
_manifest_complications: 2 metadata rows before header — skip 2 rows on ingest
amount column not visible in header sample — likely further right
filename convention changes mid-year (april2023v2.csv vs october-2023.csv)
redacted rows marked 'redacted personal data'

name: Swindon Borough Council
_manifest_complications: ISO-8859/latin1 encoding (not UTF-8); pound sign in Amount column header
Two-step URL: /downloads/file/ID/slug returns HTML; real CSV is at /download/downloads/id/ID/slug.csv
Negative values present (refunds)
Data split across two landing pages (2023 and 2024)

name: Kingston upon Hull City Council
_manifest_complications: Row 1 is a metadata date label (e.g. Apr-23,,,,,,,,) and must be skipped before the header row
Dataset includes payments below £500 threshold despite landing-page framing
Server returns Content-Type: text/csv with no file extension in URL

name: Bath and North East Somerset Council
source: Bath and North East Somerset Council — https://www.bathnes.gov.uk/expenditure-over-ps500
_manifest_complications: Q3 2023 uses filename 'July to Sept 2023.csv' instead of standard 'Q# YEAR' pattern; hard-coded exception required
Later-year files switch from space-separated to underscore-separated filenames
Supplier column mostly REDACTED
FY 2023/24 requires Q2 2023 + Q3 2023 + Q4 2023 + Q1 2024 (calendar-quarter naming)

name: City of York Council
_manifest_complications: Threshold is £250 not £500; ~15-20% extra low-value rows vs other councils; filter downstream for comparability
Filename says over250payments2023.csv but covers full FY 2023/24 (Apr 2023-Mar 2024)
Negative amounts present (refunds)
Payments to individuals are redacted
